parameters.query: SELECT provider, is_throttled FROM rate_limit_registry WHERE is_throttled = true;

INSERT INTO audit_log (event_type, source, payload) VALUES ('AGENT_CALLED', 'L1-C', '{{ JSON.stringify({model: $("Select Model").first().json.selected_model, agent: $("Select Model").first().json.assigned_agent, pillar: $("Select Model").first().json.pillar}) }}'::jsonb);
SELECT 1 AS ok;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ assigned_agent: $('Select Model').first().json.assigned_agent, selected_model: $('Select Model').first().json.selected_model, routed_at: $('Select Model').first().json.routed_at, dify_reply: ($json.choices && $json.choices[0]) ? $json.choices[0].message.content : '' }) }}
